programme.title: The Titan Games S1
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Weekend at Bunny's Alder and Dash sound the alarm after a terrifying creature threatens Scare School. Grimly Day It's Grimly Day?the grimmest day of the year!

programme.desc: Rupert and Ping Pong find a broken bird's nest, containing two eggs, which the Fox Twins have accidentally knocked out of a tree. The Mummy bird is frantic and the friends are determined to save the eggs.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Bill and Raggety meet Astra, a star child who has fallen to earth, but she need their help to return to the starry sky as she's used up too much of her ‘twinkle'

programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to “Best Fans Day” at NY’s Giraffe Stadium, where Alex gets caught up in the attention of rooting for the winning team. When his behavior ends up hurting Marty’s feelings, Alex comes to learn that the only team that matters is the one that’s made up of his friends.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman goes gaga when his favorite snack in the world, Guapo Taco Pudding, sponsors the show; beautiful Cleopatra turns out to be a belching queen.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody and Sherman accidentally create a Black Hole after skipping their chores; Winston Churchill runs away to hide in a baby nursery to avoid work.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom must rescue Olivia from the Hidden World when she winds up getting herself frozen by a pack of hungry Speed Stingers.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: When a deep freeze puts the lives of everyone in Rakke Town in jeopardy, the riders must attempt to use the dragons to get the humans through the night without being seen.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien tries to get rid of his parents, but when evil Karl traps them in the Love Gauntlet they must prove their family's strength to survive.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: After making a bet against Uncle King Julien, King Julien must win the "Jungle Games" in order to maintain control of the royal crown.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss misses the old days adventuring with his buddy Jack Sprat. Fearful he will leave San Lorenzo, Dulcinea concocts a super special adventure surprise with the orphans. But Jack Sprat shows up with the promise of a damsel in distress… who turns out to be a super scary monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss and Dulcinea embark on an adventure to find the Fountain of Youth to save Puss' old mentor, El Guante Blanco.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are captured and must find a way to escape the Dragon Fighting arena and survive an attack from the fearsome Triple Stryke dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After the Riders save a Deathsong egg from the Dragon Hunters, they must take it back to Melody Island when the hatched baby won't stop crying.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Bored of the viewing options on window, Thunk realizes what he’s been missing – real life drama! But when Thunk starts creating drama around the farm, the others set out to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Sandy is finally old enough to join Grug and Eep for the annual Daddy Daughter Day and Grug couldn’t be more excited. But when Sandy struggles to fit in with Grug and Eep’s traditions, Grug has second thoughts. It isn’t until Sandy goes missing that Grug realizes it’s time to start a new tradition.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil humiliates himself playing throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys, the Croods band together to help him regain his confidence. Unfortunately, Phil goes from confident to cocky and bets the farm on a game of throw-go-nut with the punch monkeys. Can the Croods overcome the punch monkeys - and Phil - to save the farm?

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Jun breaks the rules by sneaking a small, adorable dragon out of the Crystal Realm and bringing it home, but finds that her older brother, Eugene, has arrived and watches her every move.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom has to keep his mom, Olivia, distracted while Jun, Alex, and D’Angelo use a new dragon to close off a cave leading to the Crystal Realm, and prevent her from discovering the dragons.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When Feather is taken by a group of what appear to be zombie dragons, Alex finds her inner hero and rescues her friend.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After Jim finds the Killahead Bridge has been moved, he must use a horseshoe to find who in Arcadia is a changeling.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim finds a Changeling when babysiting for Claire & finally has proof for Trollmarket but can't tell Claire; Meanwhile AAARRRGGHH!! moves in with Toby.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful and sentient A.I. from taking over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist who must be exterminated…

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: A Pickleball Christmas
programme.desc: After winning the biggest match of his career, professional tennis phenom Luke Hollis is ready to hang up his racket and take over family's tennis club.

programme.title: Little Girl in the Window
programme.desc: When amateur photographer Iris notices "HELP" scrawled on a dusty window in a picture she took of a house, she becomes increasingly convinced that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Liz and Chris have both enjoyed living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with the same experience. However, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Living in Tuscany allows for the enjoyment of a long truffle season. Rachael shows how to use local truffles to add amazing flavour to a decadent dish of scrambled eggs and potato chips.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: In traditional Taiwanese cuisine, pig liver was regarded as a luxurious ingredient used in nutrition-boosting dishes. Legendary Chef A-fa showcases the gastronomic potential of pig liver.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Contestants must cook a dish using all nine ingredients in Poh’s Everything Mystery Box. The winner scoring themselves $5,000 to spend at Harvey Norman, the bottom three head straight into Pressure Test.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Join Michael Yo as he circles the world for meals that can't, won't and don't stop. Take a ride in a speedy elevator up a thousand feet to the highest revolving restaurant in Canada.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lee asks Dr. Zoe to help double-team needle-shy Mary Ann's crusty skin. Isaiah's mom is concerned that he is ignoring the large, growing lump over his lower spine.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Join Jason Wang to explore the Pagoda of Once Cut Pork, a renowned Taiwanese dish where Chef Hong Ming skillfully carves pork belly into a delectable, melt-in-your-mouth “pagoda” with precision knife work.

programme.title: Little Girl in the Window
programme.desc: When amateur photographer Iris notices "HELP" scrawled on a dusty window in a picture she took of a house, she becomes increasingly convinced that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: Nam-gil and Sang-yoon arrive at the end of Korea, at the beautiful Mihwangsa Temple in Haenam, with a stunning view of the South Sea. They spend a day at the temple, with the head monk.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: When Theresa's mom uncovers a pile of Theresa's childhood memorabilia, it inspires Theresa to do the same in her attic, a room she's too scared to enter.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Chef Guillaume Brahimi sets a pressure test fit for a king, pushes the contestants to their limits. They need to replicate Guillaume’s dish as closely as possible in both looks and taste.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael and her sister Maria team up to show how to make a rustic meal of roasted pork and chicken sausages, tossed with vegetables and grapes.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: When a horrible tragedy befalls someone close to her, Theresa continues to deliver messages while experiencing her own grief. Things get intense when the victim of tragedy makes himself known to Theresa.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing. Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee in helping Ryan, whose numerous head bumps undermine his life journey.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Chefs of the West are the next up in the audition round. Each contestant has 45 minutes to prepare a signature dish that will impress the judges and secure a spot in the top 20.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a traffic stop leads to a shocking arrest; a driver flees an accident with a man clinging to the hood of her car, and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man hurls furniture onto a busy NYC street from atop a skyscraper; a self-proclaimed bride is arrested for DUI on her supposed wedding day, and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When mother of two, Deanna Cook, missed her daily call to her mom, her family began to worry Deanna's 'stalker' might be involved. After texting and calling Deanna, her family called 911.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: A man finds himself in jail over stolen blueberries, and a woman who has spent her life running from the law decides to surrender in hopes of making amends with her son.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment. They discuss what happens when the news coverage dies down and how they've healed from the trauma they experienced.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Stories of mothers and fathers who made headlines by committing crimes out of malice, extremism, and desperation.

programme.title: Witness to Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: A love triangle at the University of Florida results in the murder of a popular student. An undeniable digital trail leads straight to his murderer.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a traffic stop leads to a shocking arrest; a driver flees an accident with a man clinging to the hood of her car, and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man hurls furniture onto a busy NYC street from atop a skyscraper; a self-proclaimed bride is arrested for DUI on her supposed wedding day, and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When mother of two, Deanna Cook, missed her daily call to her mom, her family began to worry Deanna's 'stalker' might be involved. After texting and calling Deanna, her family called 911.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: A man finds himself in jail over stolen blueberries, and a woman who has spent her life running from the law decides to surrender in hopes of making amends with her son.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Agent Dominick Polifrone poses as a mobster to stop the Iceman; Det. Carlos James goes undercover to thwart a plot against a woman's ex.

programme.title: Murder At the Motel
programme.desc: July 1, 2021, Falls Township, Pennsylvania. Falls Township Police are dispatched to the New Falls Motel after receiving a call about an unresponsive female.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When Susan Woods, 30, is found beaten and drowned in her tub in America's Cowboy Capitol, suspicion falls on her estranged husband.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A judge objects to an attorney's request to leave court for a family emergency; a councilwoman faces consequences for leaving the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man curses at a judge after hearing his bond amount; a defendant undresses during a virtual court appearance; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: This articulate and boastful killer is remembered for terrifying the coastal town of Santa Cruz in the early 1970s, but his desire to kill started when he was a young child fantasising about murder.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: Officer Kale Keagy encounters a suspected drunk driver who makes an unexpected demand. On the town's main drag, Officer Angel Macormic faces down a driver illegally parked in a handicap spot.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: When two beloved brothers are gunned down in their home, their devastated mother leads Gwinnett detectives to a suspect close to home.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a beloved rapper is gunned down in a hail of bullets from a drive-by shooting. With little hard evidence, detectives and prosecutors need to rely on a tipster to testify.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: When a young father from Atlanta is shot dead on a Mobile street, detectives discover that his talent for computers may have gotten him in over his head.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. programme.title: ALS

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De LA RTBF
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. Artistic director Pieter Mulier is following in the footsteps of the founder of the Alaia fashion house: sophistication at its best. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Le Journal afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: L'echappee Belge
programme.desc: Adrien Joveneau takes actor Bernard Yerles on a cycling tour of the south of the Isle of Beauty. Together, they explore Bonifacio, Porto Pollo, Sartene and Cucuruzzu, between enchanting landscapes and Corsican traditions.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Chiens Et Chats Sans Collier
programme.desc: The staff prepare for the start of the kitten season... and it's set to be complicated! Little Kenzo, a 10 year-old Chihuahua arrives at the centre. Meanwhile Marilys and Cedric take in four new dogs and adoption day has finally arrived for Aramis.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Chiens Et Chats Sans Collier

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: LA Cabane a Histoires
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: LA Cabane a Histoires
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'Imagier anime De Koumi
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre SA Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Laissez-Vous Guider
programme.desc: Stephane and LorAnt bring back to life the golden age of pirates and privateers. A journey through time and history, between Reunion Island, Mauritius and Saint-Malo. Who were these adventurers who spread terror across all the seas of the globe between the 17th and 19th centuries?

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismaël Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Geopolitis
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau
programme.desc: After the death of her son the previous year, Lana Delaunay changed her life and now runs a restaurant in a seaside resort. When 22 year old Magali is found murdered, Marleau suspects a link between the two cases. To solve this new crime, the captain must unearth old grudges from the past.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: 64' actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam notices that Cat has been spending lots of money. When she asks where it's coming from, Cat takes Sam to a "Magic ATM" that gives her free money. Sam worries that this might not be legal.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raph's brothers just don't get him. He NEEDS to fight! He's good at it too, according to his new trainer Spuds. But even though they don't see eye to eye, the Turtles must work together to stop a rampaging Bebop and Rocksteady from wrecking the city!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that’s hiring is the lamest store at the mall! // SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: Rugrats (2021)
programme.desc: Booky the Bookworm arrives at the library to read the kids a story, but Phil loses his pet worm Todd Jr. in the excitement. // Angelica tries to teach Chuckie and Kimi how to speak up for what they want, since they're going to be living together.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Stan claims to have a real Marsupilami appearing in a show he's putting on, but it's a fake robot. // Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Inspired by the latest Romcom release at the Movie Theatre, Best and Bester decide to go on a match-making mission. // Toot moves into the Sub with Best and Bester, but they find there's no getting away from her smell - literally!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester have to find a smart way to make their flight despite not looking like their passport photos. // Best decides to let his sister win "Employee of the Month" for once, but finds that losing doesn't come naturally.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina go undercover to investigate a corrupt novelty product factory. // The Patrick Show presents the "Roast of Patrick Star".

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: In a Patrick Show episode about boats, Cecil teaches Patrick how to drive. // Patrick time-travels in a race for the Krusty Krab's newest menu item.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets left with a mess when SpongeBob and Patrick use carrier clams to send messages to each other. // After cooking his kazillionth Krabby Patty, SpongeBob believes he's developed an allergy to them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The newly reformed "Clean Bubble" takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When AWOL starts seeing visions of the future right before they happen, Captain Man believes it must be the work of Swellview's leading time-crime villain, The Time Jerker.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: After discovering contestants on Swellview's Got Talent are losing consciousness, Captain Man and Kid Danger enlist the help of Charlotte and Schwoz in order to find out what is causing the mischief.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Rusty tries to bring the fun of Gus's to Duds For Dudes when he's in charge of the store. // Stella wins a school competition and is super excited - until she learns she has to give a public presentation.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna needs to get rid of a nasty case of the hiccups before a big rock competition. // The Morticians Club plan Bertrand's escape from the cruise ship his parents work on.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor. // The newly reformed "Clean Bubble" takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel. // SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!"

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Hope makes lots of noise whilst skateboarding, and her howls are heard around the city causing lots of drama. // The Twins manage the Smoothie Bar and the Marsups end up creating the best smoothie ever.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick ventures inside Cecil to learn how the body works. // Cecil takes his kids camping, but Squidina wants the drama of reality TV.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Star family's pet toilet Tinkle has eleven toilet puppies.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Louds travel to London when Luna receives an invitation to Mick Swagger's knighting ceremony but get caught up in a special mission when Lincoln runs into a familiar face.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef. // When Lynn crushes on a boy in the Swiss Alps, Lori and Leni become her crush coaches to help her talk to him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the Louds' bus gets a flat tire, they're invited to stay the night in a spooky couple's mysterious castle. // During a tour of the Parthenon, Lincoln puts on a soldier's helmet which sends him back to Ancient Greece.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and friends try to befriend new girl Kara when they learn she has access to a legendary missing comic book. // Miguel enlists Leni's help when he launches his own perfume line at Reininger's.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous! // When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: The Marsupilamis

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To avoid his responsibilities, Lincoln uses Lisa's hologram device to make it appear like he's doing all of his tasks. // With Mom busy at work, the Loud siblings are tasked with taking care of Dad when he overreacts to getting a cold.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive. // Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown. But her grandparents think it's too dangerous, so they decide to spy on her.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna needs to get rid of a nasty case of the hiccups before a big rock competition.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.desc: Max pretends to turn evil to infiltrate Mastermind's henchmen and steal the Chip-Chucker, a device that previously turned him evil.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are assigned a shared Little Buddy, Milaena, they spend the week attempting to create a mini-Sadie and mini-Lay Lay, or "Say Lay", instead of learning about what Milaena likes and what makes her unique.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. // SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna and the Moon Goats try to become a kiddie band in order to raise enough money for new equipment.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change it up. // When Lori finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play, she develops the yips.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger reveals to Captain Man that he doesn't want to be stuck in Swellview and be his sidekick forever. To make matters worse, Kid Danger is recruited by another town to be their hero.
